UG courses Accredited by NBA, and ISO 9001-2015 Certified Institution
Admission Process & Fee Details for 1* Year B. E.: 2020-2021 (COMEDK QUOTA)
Step 1: Obtain allotment order from COMEDK COUNCELLING, Then report at Admission Section, Library
Block, DSCE, Bangalore — 78 (Verification of admission order issued by respective authorities and original documents)
Step 2: Students has to report in Library Block, DSCE, Bangalore - 78, (Building No. 02)
Wait for your turn to complete the admission process (online entry)
1. Please mention student’s name, mobile no., Branch name on the back side of the DD.
2. Fees DD to be handed over to the Cashier at Librarv Block. DSCE. Bangalore - 78
> After the submission of the DD to cashier, the candidate will be allowed for the entry of the application
> After successful entry of the application form, take a print out of the application, then the candidate &
parents have to affix the signature and submit all the necessary documents as given below to the admission
> Finally, obtain the acknowledgement for submitted documents from the admission authorities.
Step 5: Collect the fees paid receipt from the cashier by showing the acknowledgement
